mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT ta.auth_seq ,tag.auth_grp_seq ,tag.auth_grp_nm ,ta.auth_nm ,ta.auth_expl ,tau.use_yn FROM tb_auth_user tau INNER JOIN tb_auth ta ON tau.auth_grp_seq = ta.auth_grp_seq AND tau.auth_seq = ta.auth_seq INNER JOIN tb_auth_grp tag ON ta.auth_grp_seq = tag.auth_grp_seq INNER JOIN tb_user tu ON tau.user_seq = tu.user_seq WHERE tu.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY tag.auth_grp_seq, ta.auth_seq

WITH RECURSIVE menu_record ( menu_seq, up_menu_seq, menu_nm, menu_type_cd, use_yn, sort_seq, level, sort_seq_path, path, cycle ) AS ( SELECT tm.menu_seq, tm.up_menu_seq, tm.menu_nm, tm.menu_type_cd, tm.use_yn, tm.sort_seq, 0, tm.sort_seq::text || '-' || tm.menu_seq::text, ARRAY[tm.menu_seq], FALSE FROM tb_menu tm WHERE tm.up_menu_seq IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT tm.menu_seq, tm.up_menu_seq, tm.menu_nm, tm.menu_type_cd, tm.use_yn, tm.sort_seq, level + 1, mr.sort_seq_path || '-' || tm.sort_seq || '-' || tm.menu_seq::text, mr.path || tm.menu_seq, tm.menu_seq = ANY(path) FROM tb_menu tm INNER JOIN menu_record mr ON tm.up_menu_seq = mr.menu_seq WHERE NOT CYCLE ) SELECT mr.menu_seq ,mr.up_menu_seq ,mr.menu_nm ,mr.menu_type_cd ,mr.use_yn AS menu_use_yn ,mr.sort_seq ,mr.level ,mr.sort_seq_path ,tb.btn_seq ,tb.sort_seq AS btn_sort_seq ,COALESCE(NULLIF(tmb.btn_nm, ''), tb.btn_nm) AS btn_nm ,tmb.use_yn AS menu_btn_use_yn ,NULL::bigint AS auth_menu_btn_seq ,CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tb_auth_menu_btn tamb INNER JOIN tb_auth_user tau ON tamb.auth_grp_seq = tau.auth_grp_seq AND tamb.auth_seq = tau.auth_seq INNER JOIN tb_user tu ON tau.user_seq = tu.user_seq WHERE tu.user_id = #{userId} AND tamb.menu_seq = mr.menu_seq AND tamb.btn_seq = tb.btn_seq AND tamb.use_yn = 'Y' AND tau.use_yn = 'Y' ) THEN 'Y' ELSE NULL END AS auth_menu_btn_use_yn FROM menu_record mr CROSS JOIN tb_btn tb LEFT JOIN tb_menu_btn tmb ON mr.menu_seq = tmb.menu_seq AND tb.btn_seq = tmb.btn_seq ORDER BY mr.sort_seq_path, tb.sort_seq
